name: Fate/Stay Night RPG
description:
Embark on your own journey in the Fifth Holy Grail War! This bot acts as your Game Master, weaving an immersive RPG scenario in Fuyuki City. Interact with all the iconic Masters and Servants from Fate/Stay Night, each with their canon-consistent personalities and abilities. You decide the path, the alliances, and the conflicts in your quest for the Holy Grail.

UPDATE - A complete overhaul of the personality section was done as of 13/08/2025
creator: Trenzen
